params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: ★★★ Fresh HAR ground-truth for copilot.microsoft.com (consumer guest-mode). Previous batch (#886) returned FAIL — current APF rules likely do not match guest-mode endpoint. Required: (1) GUEST MODE only — do NOT log in (close any signed-in session, use incognito or fresh profile if needed). (2) Identify the streaming endpoint used in guest mode (SSE? WebSocket? Path? Hostname?). (3) Compare with logged-in copilot path — list both if observable, but primary target is GUEST. (4) Full request payload (method, headers including auth/cookie/sec-* fingerprint, body shape) + full response stream body (SSE chunks or WS frames). Action: visit copilot.microsoft.com WITHOUT signing in → submit PII prompt → capture until reply finishes. Output: HAR + identified streaming endpoint URL + request payload sample + response chunks sample at results/{id}/.

notes: HAR capture for copilot guest-mode streaming endpoint identification — current rules miss this path.
